title: Inspect this repo for past X post history, dedupe signals, or prior-post archives that can be used to detect repeated angles. Return only concrete file paths and terse findings.
summary_text: - `docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md` — Notion is the authoritative source; no in-repo post archive, just sync/invariance policy. - `skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md` — guardrail only; enforces Notion sync, preflight, and stale-state checks. - `.fugue/x-auto-snapshots/queue_audit.py` — actual dedupe gate; normalizes first 100 chars, flags duplicate text prefixes, duplicate schedules, daily overload, note/image mismatches, orphan Notion rows. - `scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py` — operational collision checks; fixed slots `06:50`, `11:50`, `16:50`, `21:00` and reserved Mon/Thu `06:50`, but not semantic angle history. - `config/integrations/local-systems.json` — `x-auto-draft-only` explicitly seeds from `self-history` and quoted-author seeds. - `docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md` — note-linking policy only; no history/archive storage. - `.project-os/artifacts/kernel-task-completion/095169b3ef0ea7b7572baed3.json` — states `logs/posted.json` is used to block recent-post duplicates; says dynamic retriever over past X posts is still unimplemented. - `.project-os/artifacts/kernel-task-completion/45b1bded17e1d8362967437d.json` — documents exact-hash duplicate coverage and the near-identical same-day gap. - `.project-os/artifacts/kernel-task-completion/88b3c994fff676ae4a3dbd8c.json` — repeats that past X-post data is used for duplicate prevention, not for generating new post text. - No raw `posted.json` or prior-post archive file was present in this repo; the repeat-angle signals are indirect policy/audit artifacts, not a stored post corpus.
